news:news.news:title: High oil prices could lead to a global recession, while geopolitical tensions and local political shifts are impacting various regions.
news:news.news:keywords: global economic outlook, Denmark political situation, Iran conflict implications, Australia EU trade agreement, impact of oil prices on economy

news:news.news:title: TSA workers face uncertainty amid a government shutdown, while Delta Airlines suspends special services for Congress members as funding battles continue.
news:news.news:keywords: TSA funding and government shutdown, Delta Airlines Congress service suspension, impact of Iran war on energy prices, prediction markets regulation, effects of corporate jargon on employee performance

news:news.news:title: Meta faces a $375 million penalty for misleading users about product safety, while Apple and NASA announce significant updates and plans for their technologies.
news:news.news:keywords: Meta's legal issues, NASA's lunar base plans, Apple's Siri updates, OpenAI's project discontinuation, Arm's new CPU for AI

news:news.news:title: Hubert Davis was fired as UNC's basketball coach following an early NCAA tournament exit, while other sports news includes significant player contracts and rule changes.
news:news.news:keywords: coaching changes in college basketball, Tiger Woods return to golf, NBA injury updates, NFL player contracts, MLB player contracts

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include advancements in insulin delivery, memory storage, and the behavior of honey bees, alongside significant findings in astronomy and paleontology.
news:news.news:keywords: insulin delivery advancements, honey bee behavior, memory storage in the brain, radiation damage mechanisms, new species discoveries

news:news.news:title: Diplomatic efforts by the US president coincide with significant global events, including a military plane crash in Colombia and a terrorist attack in Ukraine.
news:news.news:keywords: US-Iran diplomatic relations, Colombian military plane crash details, Italy's political challenges, Slovenia fuel rationing news, Ukraine terrorist attack updates

news:news.news:title: Stock markets reacted to geopolitical tensions as oil prices fell following Trump's postponement of strikes on Iran, while the IEA warns of a significant energy crisis.
news:news.news:keywords: geopolitical impact on markets, US Senate sports betting legislation, corporate culture and employee performance, AI and wealth inequality, OnlyFans ownership and industry impact

news:news.news:title: The US government has banned foreign-made consumer routers, while Nvidia's CEO claims the company has achieved artificial general intelligence.
news:news.news:keywords: US government technology regulations, Nvidia AGI claims, Apple Maps advertising plans

news:news.news:title: The NCAA Women's March Madness Sweet 16 features a strong showing from SEC and ACC teams, while MLB and NBA teams make significant roster moves.
news:news.news:keywords: NCAA Women's March Madness updates, MLB player contract news, NBA coaching controversies

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include breakthroughs in weight loss for postmenopausal women, insights into food's environmental impact, and advancements in quantum technology and Alzheimer’s research.
news:news.news:keywords: weight loss breakthroughs, environmental impact of food, Alzheimer's disease research, quantum technology advancements, oldest cave art discovery

news:news.news:title: Meta Hit with $375M Fine for Misleading Users as Congress Faces TSA Shutdown Chaos
Nvidia Claims AGI Breakthrough as US Bans Foreign Routers Amidst Global Turmoil
